benefits.description: Really good sleep, woke up feeling refreshed each morning
Felt overall healthier, internally clean feeling

side_effects.description: Sore spot on abdomen from epitalon injection lasting several weeks

protocol_notes: Used epitalon twice, second round had diminished benefits compared to first. User notes it is intended for use only twice a year. Turning 40 next month at time of posting. Motivated by long-term DNA health and aging well, sleep improvement, and general wellbeing. Wants to take a break from peptides due to injection site issues.
